prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-13STSK-13E-BLCK-2 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: 13" Slotted Lightweight Tactical Survival Knife Hard Rubber Handle Glass Breaker Description: Protect yourself in the event of an emergency with the 13" Slotted Tactical Survival Knife.

This 13" survival knife features crucial improvements you won't find on the average fixed blade. The blade itself is constructed of hardened 440 steel; 7.5" long and slotted throughout to reduce weight. The reverse edge of the blade features a ridged thumb support area for detail work.

For roadside emergencies the butt of the handle features a steel glass breaker. This metal punch is also great for self defense and shattering dangerous ice buildup.

We recommend you keep this knife in a small bag with some other emergency supplies. Leave it in your car, truck, or home for those last minute evacuations and unfortunate surprises. Search Terms: camping knife survival emergency blade window punch auto tool Features: - Overall Length: 13" - Blade Length: 7.5" - Hard Rubber Grip Handle - Glass Breaker Butt Point - Slotted Blade to Reduce Weight === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 13in Black Slotted Survival Knife Glass Breaker

anthropic.title_differentiation: 75In Hardened 440 Steel Blade, Lightweight Slotted Design, Hard Rubber Grip, Steel Glass Breaker Butt, Emergency And Camping

openai.title_differentiation: 440 Steel Blade, Slotted Lightweight Design, Hard Rubber Grip, Glass Breaker Butt Point, Thumb Support
